mission.title: operator-framework: CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not surface errors for invalid tags
mission.description: CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not surface errors for invalid tags. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify operator-framework troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your operator-framework deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework -n operator-framework --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review operator-framework configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant operator-framework configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework
kubectl get configmap -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=operator-framework
```
## Bug Report

**What did you do?**
Run `operator-sdk generate openapi` for the following `pkg/apis/..._types.go` file that has the invalid marker comment `// +kubebuilderfoo=bar`.

steps.title: Apply the fix for CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not surface…
steps.description:
This should be fixed by #2201, which directly uses `controller-gen crd` API and surfaces errors appropriately.

Note that `generate openapi` has been deprecated in favor of `generate crds`. A lot of these issues will go away now that `openapi-gen` is not longer run by default.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm CRD generation via `generate openapi` does not… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework -n operator-framework --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n operator-framework --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
This should be fixed by #2201, which directly uses `controller-gen crd` API and surfaces errors appropriately.

Note that `generate openapi` has been deprecated in favor of `generate crds`. A lot of these issues will go away now that `openapi-gen` is not longer run by default.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with operator-framework installed or the issue environment reproducible.
